description: 8B reranker with Q4_K_M quantization (5.0 GB) — top accuracy for multilingual RAG reranking across 100+ languages.
fullDescription:
## IMPORTANT NOTE ##
This model runs on CPU only. If you want to run it on GPU, please install the generic version of Ollama program.

This is a shared app. Once installed by the Olares Admin, all users in the cluster can use it through reference app.

## MODEL OVERVIEW ##
Qwen3-Reranker-8B is a text reranking model from Alibaba's Qwen team, built on the Qwen3-8B-Base architecture. It is designed for ranking and reordering search results, evaluating document relevance to queries across diverse applications.

The model supports 100+ languages with instruction-aware capabilities for task customization. It ranks among top performers in multilingual retrieval benchmarks (MTEB, CMTEB, MMTEB).

**Note:** As of June 2025, Ollama doesn't fully support reranking models in Ragflow/Dify. Alternatives include FastGPT or vLLM deployment.

## QUANTIZATION ##
This model uses **Q4_K_M** quantization (5.0 GB). Quantization compresses model weights from 16-bit to 4-bit precision, reducing memory usage ~4x with minimal quality loss. The K-quant method keeps critical layers at higher precision.

## Model Details
- Model Name: Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-8B
- Parameters: 8B
- Quantization: Q4_K_M (5.0GB)
- Context Length: 32768 tokens
- Task: Text Reranking
- Languages: 100+
modelReadme:
Qwen3-Reranker-8B is a text reranking model from Alibaba's Qwen team, built on the Qwen3-8B-Base architecture. It supports 100+ languages with instruction-aware capabilities for task customization. It ranks among top performers in multilingual retrieval benchmarks (MTEB, CMTEB, MMTEB).

Five quantized versions available: Q3_K_M (4.1GB), Q4_K_M (5.0GB), Q5_K_M (5.8GB), Q8_0 (8.7GB), F16 (16GB). Q5_K_M or Q4_K_M recommended for most users.

Note: As of June 2025, Ollama doesn't fully support reranking models in RAGflow, Dify, and FastGPT. Alternatives include API-based or vLLM deployment.
name: qwen3-reranker-8b
title: Qwen3 Reranker 8B (Ollama)
